summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact marks the shard as non-dedupe, with no shared canonical, no security-sensitive hydrated items, and no allowed merge/fix/raise_pr actions. All hydrated PRs are classified conservatively as independent work to keep open; unhydrated listed PRs are non-mutating needs_human because the artifact did not provide live target_updated_at state.
